summary: Comprehensive testing of PRONOKIF F1 app with new Top 10 predictions, Sprint Weekend support, DNF multi-select, and First Corner Leader features. Backend 100% (23/23 tests passed after bug fix). Frontend working correctly with all new features visible and functional.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Leaderboard endpoint returning 500 error due to None username not handled properly
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added explicit None check for username in get_leaderboard function - user_data.get('username') can return None even with default fallback

backend: Get next race (Chinese GP - Sprint Weekend)
Get existing prediction with Top 10 format
China GP marked as Sprint Weekend
frontend: Auth page with gaming neon theme
Predictions page with all selection steps
Sprint Weekend steps (Sprint Q, Sprint R) visible
All 20 driver cards with team colors
Bonus section with Safety Car toggle
Admin page accessible for league creator

features_verified.top_10_predictions: Working - Quali Top 10 and Race Top 10 selection
features_verified.sprint_weekend: Working - Sprint Q and Sprint R steps visible for China GP
features_verified.dnf_multi_select: Working - Can select multiple DNF drivers (up to 5)
features_verified.first_corner_leader: Working - New bonus bet field visible in UI and API
features_verified.openf1_integration: API endpoint exists, returns status for manual entry

seed_data_creation: Test user already existed with existing predictions for China 2026 race
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend leaderboard bug was fixed (None username handling). All new Top 10, Sprint Weekend, DNF multi-select, and First Corner Leader features are working. Test user has existing predictions for china-2026. The admin page is accessible via /admin route for league creators. OpenF1 API returns 404 for 2026 data as expected (data not yet available).

rca_of_issue.root_cause: In get_leaderboard function, user_data.get('username', 'Anonymous') returned None when user has username: null in database, because the key exists with value null
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Changed to explicit None check: username = user_data.get('username') if user_data else None; if not username: username = 'Anonymous'
reproduction_steps: 1. Register a new user without setting username
3. Get leaderboard - 500 error due to None username
